description: The Rotation At Target Point node takes a set of parameters that represent a rotation, then returns a rotational value that points in a direction.

fields.Pivot: The rotational pivot for this value to calculate with.
fields.Point: The rotational value that it will calculate from.
fields.Direction: The direction to help orientate this rotational value.
fields.TargetPoint: The direction this rotational value will look towards.
fields.* ([[Type:floatQ|floatQ]]): Returns the rotational value that represents the pointing or facing in a direction.
